name: BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied
notes: This Building Block AWS defines denied api requests.
bb_references: BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
when the event matches Error Code (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [AccessDenied or Client.UnauthorizedOperation]
TD_list: APPLY BB: AWS Cloud: API Request Has Been Denied on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Amazon AWS CloudTrail
AND when the event matches Error Code (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Error Code (custom) is any of [AccessDenied or Client.UnauthorizedOperation]
